title: Bump bundled krunkit to 0.2.1
body:
Bump the bundled krunkit version from 0.2.0 to 0.2.1.

cc/ @jakecorrenti 

```release-note
Bump the bundled krunkit version from 0.2.0 to 0.2.1.
```

comments.body: @baude Are we going to want this in 5.5?
